summary: Completed frontend testing of basketball demo mode player substitution, home page auth state handling, and login redirect. All features working correctly.

issues: Account dropdown shows 'Admin' for admin users instead of user name/email - this is correct behavior as the user's name is 'Admin'

seed_data_creation: Demo mode uses hardcoded team data - Northside Tigers (home) and Eastwood Eagles (away) with 10 players each
context_for_next_testing_agent: Basketball demo mode player substitution fully tested. Home page auth state handling verified. Admin user gets Gold tier access automatically.

details.description: Player checkboxes are visible for all players in demo mode
Can uncheck a player to sub them out
Can check a player to sub them in (only if less than 5 on floor)
Cannot sub in more than 5 players - checkbox is disabled
details.verification: Checkbox click timed out because element was not enabled

details.description: Local state updates correctly when toggling players (no API call needed in demo mode)
details.note: Demo mode uses local state for player check-in/out instead of API calls

details.hero_button: Get Started button visible in hero section
